message:
test(bd-1x3c): add router.rs cancellation, task manager, and mount result tests

Cover cx-cancelled early return paths in handle_tools_call,
handle_resources_read, and handle_prompts_get. Exercise handle_tasks
list/get/not-found with a real TaskManager. Verify MountResult::is_success
is always true. Fix formatting in oauth.rs from prior commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
